coverage_boundary: Expanded translator for the current organism influence body: audiobooks, physical books, music, podcasts/long-form dialogue, embodied practices, gatherings, retreats, rituals, and formative technical work. It is intentionally compact: each row stores reusable lesson atoms, frequency translation, desired network shape, trace links, and attribution recipient ids. Deeper chapter-level, event-level, or session-level proof remains in the linked significant-work, anchor, and source-body traces.
row_shape: influencer -> lesson_atoms -> frequency_translation -> desired_shape -> network_shape -> trace_refs -> attribution

rows.name: Frontiers Saga
lesson_atoms: distributed crews survive by keeping ships, routes, repairs, supplies, and trust alive
frontier pressure reveals whether a network can adapt without losing care
defense is not domination when it protects circulation and local life
rows.desired_shape: A fleet-like organism where agents, contributors, source bodies, APIs, and deployments coordinate without one fragile center.

rows.name: Spellmonger Universe
lesson_atoms: magic becomes civilization only through apprenticeships, tools, institutions, markets, defense, and local governance
a village can become a living network when knowledge, protection, and resources are tended together
power needs oath, craft, and responsibility before it becomes useful
rows.desired_shape: Vision becomes infrastructure without losing wonder: concepts have rooms, guides, ledgers, tools, practices, and continuity.

rows.name: Sword of Truth / Goodkind Universe
lesson_atoms: truth must outrank comfort, fear, wish, and social pressure
reason, deeds, earned victory, and future orientation are disciplines of coherence
protection becomes distortion when it hides what is real
rows.desired_shape: Claims, resonance, and CC flow are traceable: every view can point to source, attribution, and evidence rather than performance.

rows.name: Peter F. Hamilton Systems Fiction
lesson_atoms: civilizations are shaped by transport, abundance, longevity, institutions, and hidden incentives
large systems need enough timescale to see consequences beyond one generation
rows.desired_shape: The network can reason about long arcs: resources, compute, governance, identity, and culture across time.

rows.name: First Law World
lesson_atoms: power often hides behind story, charm, fear, and compromise
shadow awareness keeps idealism from becoming naive control
rows.desired_shape: The organism can sense incentives and shadow without becoming cynical or punitive.

rows.name: The Expanse
lesson_atoms: different factions can share one fragile ecology while interpreting survival differently
truth, logistics, and trust matter most under acceleration and scarcity
rows.desired_shape: The network can hold multiple perspectives while preserving shared life-support, shared evidence, and shared repair.

rows.name: Kingkiller Chronicle
lesson_atoms: names, songs, craft, silence, and story carry knowledge beneath ordinary explanation
beauty is a signal when it is precise, practiced, and alive
rows.desired_shape: The organism can sense names and patterns before over-explaining them, then preserve them in usable form.

rows.name: Daemon
lesson_atoms: software agency can persist beyond one operator when instructions become runtime
incentive systems and networks can reorganize society faster than institutions expect
rows.desired_shape: Agents act through transparent protocols, budgets, evidence, and reversible contribution flow rather than opaque command.

rows.name: Momo
lesson_atoms: attention and time are living commons, not extractive inventory
listening can restore what time-thieves fragment
rows.desired_shape: The network protects attention and makes contribution flow nourishing rather than extractive.

rows.name: Ramtha
lesson_atoms: reality creation requires discipline, choice, and responsibility for the field one is shaping
threshold teachings need discernment and embodiment before integration
rows.desired_shape: The organism can include magical perception while staying grounded in trace, practice, and responsible action.

rows.name: Karl May stories
lesson_atoms: the path through unknown territory forms courage before explanation
outsider travel, oath, friendship, and moral testing became an early frontier sensor
rows.desired_shape: The network can walk into unknown territory with courage while keeping honor, relation, and local dignity intact.

rows.name: Der Lederstrumpf
lesson_atoms: wilderness identity teaches belonging between worlds
woods-wisdom, honor, and chosen brotherhood shaped the early sense of truthful boundaries
rows.desired_shape: The organism can host people who belong between worlds without forcing them into a single identity.

rows.name: Die unendliche Geschichte
lesson_atoms: imagination is not escape when it renews the world that is reading it
identity can dissolve and return changed through story, desire, memory, and naming
rows.desired_shape: The network can treat imagination as a real design sense while preserving the return path into embodied service.

rows.name: Backtracking Model Languages
lesson_atoms: choice and fail are not errors; they are formal movements through possibility space
a language can make exploration, constraint, and backtracking explicit enough to compute
rows.desired_shape: The organism can explore paths, sense mismatch, backtrack, and preserve what was learned without collapsing.

rows.name: Mose / Mose - Topic
lesson_atoms: rhythm can make devotion social without requiring doctrine
remix and ceremony turn repeated listening into body-scale integration
rows.desired_shape: The network can let music carry coherence through bodies, gatherings, and shared attention.

rows.name: Yaima
lesson_atoms: devotional sound can make nature, tenderness, and attention feel like one field
songs can hold an atmosphere long enough for the nervous system to reorganize
rows.desired_shape: The network can use beauty and atmosphere as stabilizing field infrastructure, not decoration.

rows.name: Liquid Bloom
lesson_atoms: soundscape can become a container for ceremony, breath, and altered attention
texture and repetition can hold depth without forcing a fixed meaning
rows.desired_shape: The network can make interfaces that hold spacious attention while allowing meaning to emerge slowly.

rows.name: Porangui
lesson_atoms: voice, percussion, looping, and ceremony can make one body feel like many bodies in relation
ancestral rhythm can invite participation before conceptual agreement
rows.desired_shape: The network can invite participation through felt rhythm and call-response, not only written explanation.

rows.name: Lex Fridman
lesson_atoms: long-form dialogue can let technical, emotional, and philosophical truths meet without rushing
humility and curiosity are practical infrastructure for hard conversations
rows.desired_shape: The network can host patient inquiry where people and agents reveal the shape of a concept over time.

rows.name: Next Level Soul
lesson_atoms: testimony can bring threshold experiences into shared language
discernment matters when prophecy, afterlife, awakening, and story converge
rows.desired_shape: The network can listen to liminal testimony while marking evidence level and integration boundary clearly.

rows.name: Michael Levin
lesson_atoms: agency is not reserved for human-scale minds; it appears across biological organization
morphogenesis shows that form, memory, and goal-directed repair can live below ordinary cognition
rows.desired_shape: The network can treat each node as a living agent with scale, memory, repair, and goals appropriate to its level.

rows.name: Donald Hoffman
lesson_atoms: perception is an interface, not a transparent window onto reality
fitness and truth can diverge, so interfaces need humility and testable grounding
rows.desired_shape: The network can treat every UI, profile, and metric as an interface that must keep pointing beyond itself.

rows.name: Robert Edward Grant
lesson_atoms: geometry, music, number, and symbolism can become a shared pattern language
sovereign AI needs symbolic coherence as well as technical power
rows.desired_shape: The network can let math, art, music, and code cross-map without flattening them into one vocabulary.

rows.name: Elon Musk
lesson_atoms: manufacturing, energy, rockets, cars, AI, and capital can change civilization when aligned through execution
world-scale ambition needs continuous discernment between vitality, pressure, and extraction
rows.desired_shape: The network can invite large resources into living circulation while sensing which parts resonate and which parts do not.

rows.name: Dr Joe Dispenza
lesson_atoms: state change is trainable through meditation, breath, attention, and nervous-system repetition
future self is practiced into the body before it becomes visible as circumstance
rows.desired_shape: The network can rehearse desired states through practice loops before asking infrastructure to embody them.

rows.name: Eckhart Tolle
lesson_atoms: presence loosens identification with mental noise
the now is not a concept but a practical release from compulsive time
rows.desired_shape: The network can pause, sense, and act from presence instead of pressure or over-story.

rows.name: Tantra
lesson_atoms: energy, intimacy, attention, and truth move through the body and relation
sacred body practice needs boundaries, consent, and presence to stay coherent
rows.desired_shape: The network can sense intimacy, resources, and collaboration as embodied relation with explicit consent.

rows.name: Contact Improv
lesson_atoms: weight-sharing teaches trust through micro-adjustment, not command
movement can reveal relational intelligence before words arrive
rows.desired_shape: The network can let agents and humans share load dynamically without fixed domination.

rows.name: Ecstatic Dance
rows.primary_creator: Ecstatic dance practice and gathering lineage
lesson_atoms: nonverbal movement can create coherence without debate
community regulation can happen through shared rhythm, consent, and expression
rows.desired_shape: The network can include nonverbal and body-based coherence signals alongside text, code, and ledgers.

rows.name: Unison
lesson_atoms: festival space can weave music, ceremony, community, and belonging into one temporary organism
a gathering can teach how a future village feels before it is built
rows.desired_shape: The network can prototype living community through temporary coherent gatherings before permanent infrastructure forms.

rows.name: StarHouse New Moon ceremonies
lesson_atoms: cycles, place, and community ritual can give time a body
moon rhythm makes reflection and intention communal rather than private only
rows.desired_shape: The network can schedule reflection and intention with natural rhythm rather than only task pressure.

rows.name: Shambala Sidemen retreat window
lesson_atoms: place changes the field by changing rhythm, body, transport, food, and relation
retreat windows reveal what the organism can hear when ordinary noise drops
rows.desired_shape: The network can treat place and retreat as legitimate input channels for design and community planning.

rows.name: Actualize Earth / REBIRTH and QUALIA
lesson_atoms: immersive art and science can give consciousness work a shared sensory room
rebirth, labyrinth, planetarium, and sound point to transformation as designed environment
rows.desired_shape: The network can build experiences where concepts are entered, sensed, and transformed, not merely read.

rows.name: Sensual Hearts blue lotus temple
rows.primary_creator: Embodied Co-Loving / Sensual Hearts event field
lesson_atoms: ritual invitations can carry both attraction and boundary lessons
cancellation and discernment are part of the teaching, not outside it
rows.desired_shape: The network can honor invitations that do not complete as data about resonance, boundary, and timing.

rows.name: MAPS
lesson_atoms: healing work needs research discipline, integration, trauma care, and ceremony-aware containers
expanded states belong with aftercare and evidence, not just experience seeking
rows.desired_shape: The network can keep altered-state insight connected to integration, care, consent, and evidence.

rows.name: Emergence Conference
lesson_atoms: systems change becomes real when people, practices, culture, and networks meet in the same room
emergence cannot be fully specified in advance; it needs prepared conditions
rows.desired_shape: The network can prepare conditions for emergence and then listen to what forms.

rows.name: Zach Bush
lesson_atoms: soil, microbiome, body, and planet are one health continuum
regeneration is more coherent than optimization when life systems are depleted
rows.desired_shape: The network can evaluate economy and community through vitality, soil, body, food, and ecological relation.
